requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Requirements for BESS Power Conversion System (PCS / Storage Inverter)
requirement_topic.zh: 储能系统并网要求（储能变流器/PCS侧）
requirement_topic.zht: 儲能系統並網要求（儲能變流器／PCS側）

summary.en: BESS storage inverters (PCS) connecting to Portuguese grids must comply with EN 50549-1 (low voltage, ≤16 A/phase) or EN 50549-2 (medium voltage), which specify requirements for generating plants up to 75 kVA and above connected in parallel with the public distribution network, including voltage/frequency ride-through, reactive power capability, anti-islanding, and reconnection limits. Additionally, national grid codes apply: REN (Redes Energéticas Nacionais) manages the Portuguese transmission network (RNT) and publishes technical requirements for connection; E-Redes (formerly EDP Distribuição) manages the distribution network and publishes connection technical manuals. At the EU level, Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (Requirements for Generators, RfG) sets binding requirements for power-generating modules above the thresholds defined by each member state. The Portuguese grid is 230/400 V 50 Hz at low voltage; ERSE oversees the energy sector.
summary.zh: 接入葡萄牙电网的储能变流器（PCS）须符合EN 50549-1（低压，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中压）标准，规定了并联接入公共配电网的发电装置（≤75 kVA及以上）的电压/频率穿越、无功功率能力、孤岛保护及重新并网要求。此外还须遵守国家电网规程：REN（葡萄牙能源网络）负责管理葡萄牙输电网络（RNT）并发布并网技术要求；E-Redes（原EDP Distribuição）负责管理配电网并发布并网技术手册。欧盟层面，欧盟委员会法规（EU）2016/631（发电机要求，RfG）对超过各成员国规定阈值的发电模块设定了具有约束力的故障穿越、频率响应和无功功率交换要求。葡萄牙低压电网为230/400 V、50 Hz；ERSE负责能源行业监管。
summary.zht: 接入葡萄牙電網的儲能變流器（PCS）須符合EN 50549-1（低壓，≤16 A/相）或EN 50549-2（中壓）標準，規定了並聯接入公共配電網的發電裝置（≤75 kVA及以上）的電壓／頻率穿越、無功功率能力、孤島保護及重新並網要求。此外還須遵守國家電網規程：REN（葡萄牙能源網絡）負責管理葡萄牙輸電網絡（RNT）並發布並網技術要求；E-Redes（原EDP Distribuição）負責管理配電網並發布並網技術手冊。歐盟層面，歐盟委員會法規（EU）2016/631（發電機要求，RfG）對超過各成員國規定閾值的發電模組設定了具有約束力的故障穿越、頻率響應和無功功率交換要求。葡萄牙低壓電網為230/400 V、50 Hz；ERSE負責能源行業監管。

standards_or_laws: REN (Redes Energéticas Nacionais) — Transmission network connection technical requirements
E-Redes — Distribution network connection technical manuals (Manual de Ligações)
ERSE — Entidade Reguladora dos Serviços Energéticos (energy sector oversight)

summary.en: In China, grid-connected storage inverters (PCS) are governed primarily by GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System), which superseded GB/T 34120-2017. The 2023 revision extended the AC output voltage upper limit to 35 kV, added fault ride-through (LVRT/HVRT) and primary frequency response requirements, and updated product classification. GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Power Station Connected to Power System) is sometimes referenced for inverter grid-connection behaviour. The National Energy Administration (NEA) and grid companies (State Grid / Southern Grid) also issue enterprise standards (Q/GDW series) for energy storage grid connection.
summary.zh: 中国并网储能变流器（PCS）主要依据GB/T 34120-2023《电化学储能系统储能变流器技术要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），规定了PCS的电气性能、并网保护、孤岛检测及通信接口要求。2023年修订版将交流输出电压上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次调频要求，并更新了产品分类。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定》有时也被参考用于逆变器并网行为。国家能源局及电网企业（国家电网/南方电网）还发布Q/GDW系列企业标准用于储能并网。
summary.zht: 中國並網儲能變流器（PCS）主要依據GB/T 34120-2023《電化學儲能系統儲能變流器技術要求》（取代GB/T 34120-2017），規定了PCS的電氣性能、並網保護、孤島檢測及通信接口要求。2023年修訂版將交流輸出電壓上限提高至35 kV，增加了故障穿越（LVRT/HVRT）和一次調頻要求，並更新了產品分類。GB/T 19964-2024《光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定》有時亦被參考用於逆變器並網行為。國家能源局及電網企業（國家電網／南方電網）還發布Q/GDW系列企業標準用於儲能並網。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34120-2023 — Technical Requirements for Power Conversion System of Electrochemical Energy Storage System (SAMR/SAC; supersedes GB/T 34120-2017; recommended national standard)
Q/GDW 1564-2014 (State Grid enterprise standard — current supersession status not publicly confirmable; verify with State Grid or SAC for any post-2020 revision)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 34120 is not accepted as equivalent to EN 50549-1/-2 or the Portuguese REN/E-Redes grid codes for EU market access. PCS units exported from China must be re-tested and re-certified to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 by a recognised test laboratory (typically accredited under EA/DAkkS/UKAS or IPAC in Portugal), and must satisfy the applicable national grid code. The EU RfG Regulation (2016/631) is directly applicable law in Portugal; Chinese type-test reports against GB/T 34120 are not substitutable. Key technical gaps include different voltage/frequency ride-through profiles, reactive power Q(U) curves, reconnection delay settings, and communication protocol requirements. Portuguese documentation requirements often call for Portuguese-language manuals and project files.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 34120不被欧盟市场认可为EN 50549-1/-2或葡萄牙REN/E-Redes电网规程的等效标准。从中国出口的储能变流器须经认可检测实验室（通常经EA/DAkkS/UKAS认可，或葡萄牙IPAC认可）重新测试并取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2认证，并须满足适用的国家电网规程。欧盟法规（EU）2016/631在葡萄牙具有直接法律效力，依据GB/T 34120出具的中国型式试验报告不可替代。主要技术差距包括：电压/频率穿越曲线、无功功率Q(U)曲线、重新并网延迟设置和通信协议要求不同。葡萄牙文件要求通常还需提供葡萄牙语手册和项目文件。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 34120不被歐盟市場認可為EN 50549-1/-2或葡萄牙REN/E-Redes電網規程的等效標準。從中國出口的儲能變流器須經認可檢測實驗室（通常經EA/DAkkS/UKAS認可，或葡萄牙IPAC認可）重新測試並取得EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2認證，並須滿足適用的國家電網規程。歐盟法規（EU）2016/631在葡萄牙具有直接法律效力，依據GB/T 34120出具的中國型式試驗報告不可替代。主要技術差距包括：電壓／頻率穿越曲線、無功功率Q(U)曲線、重新並網延遲設置和通訊協議要求不同。葡萄牙文件要求通常還需提供葡萄牙語手冊和項目文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EN 50549-1/-2 are harmonised standards supporting the Low Voltage Directive and relevant national grid codes; EU RfG 2016/631 is directly binding EU law in Portugal. REN and E-Redes grid codes are mandatory for grid connection approval in Portugal.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid connection in China — GB/T 34120-2023 is a recommended national standard (推荐性国标) but compliance is effectively required by State Grid / Southern Grid connection rules. The recommended classification has not changed in the 2023 edition.

source.publisher: REN — Redes Energéticas Nacionais (Portugal transmission network operator)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese PCS / storage inverters certified only to GB/T 34120 are NOT compliant for Portuguese or EU grid connection. Full re-testing to EN 50549-1 or EN 50549-2 and satisfaction of the REN/E-Redes national grid codes is required before connecting to the Portuguese grid. Engage an accredited EU (IPAC or equivalent) test laboratory early in the product development cycle. Portuguese-language project documentation is commonly required by E-Redes for distribution-level connection applications.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅依据GB/T 34120认证的中国储能变流器不符合葡萄牙或欧盟并网要求。在接入葡萄牙电网之前，须完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2及REN/E-Redes国家电网规程的完整重新测试。建议在产品开发周期早期联系经认可的欧盟（IPAC或同等机构）检测实验室。E-Redes配电级并网申请通常要求提供葡萄牙语项目文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅依據GB/T 34120認證的中國儲能變流器不符合葡萄牙或歐盟並網要求。在接入葡萄牙電網之前，須完成EN 50549-1或EN 50549-2及REN/E-Redes國家電網規程的完整重新測試。建議在產品開發週期早期聯繫經認可的歐盟（IPAC或同等機構）檢測實驗室。E-Redes配電級並網申請通常要求提供葡萄牙語項目文件。
